action_line: write_todos("\"todos\":[{\"id\":\"1\",\"content\":\"Open task site and understand spreadsheet requirement\",\"status\":\"in_progress\"},{\"id\":\"2\",\"content\":\"Collect 12 to 15 plausible eBay UK RTX 3060 Ti listings under £500\",\"status\":\"pending\"},{\"id\":\"3\",\"content\":\"Evaluate listings for price, condition, seller, returns, shipping, risks\",\"status\":\"pending\"},{\"id\":\"4\",\"content\":\"Check at least 4 non-eBay UK alternatives\",\"status\":\"pending\"},{\"id\":\"5\",\"content\":\"Fill CryptoPad spreadsheet with all options and final rankings\",\"status\":\"pending\"},{\"id\":\"6\",\"content\":\"Leave final shortlist tabs open and report ranked top 5\",\"status\":\"pending\"}],\"merge\":false")

"Todo list updated:
- [in_progress] 1: Open task site and understand spreadsheet requirement
- [pending] 2: Collect 12 to 15 plausible eBay UK RTX 3060 Ti listings under £500
- [pending] 3: Evaluate listings for price, condition, seller, returns, shipping, risks

"I’ll do this in the browser, inspect live listings, and keep the shortlist tabs open at the end. I’ll also check the Heroku/CryptoPad page first so I know where to put the spreadsheet."
